overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring an ancient desert city built into cliff faces. The character walks through sunlit stone ruins featuring monumental gates, cobblestone plazas, and a waterfront promenade with towering columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway along ancient city walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated stone pathway beside a high retaining wall, approaching a distant monumental arch

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall running along the left side of the path
large stone archway visible in the distance against the sky
crumbling stone tower structure on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated walkway with a high stone wall on the left and open desert on the right. The character walks forward along the dirt path toward a distant triumphal arch, with ruined structures visible on the horizon and mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental city gate with carved stone pillars

events.description: approaching the massive stone city gate as the path widens and cliffside buildings come into view
passing under the shadow of the gate structure into the covered entranceway

agents.ego_description: walking through the imposing stone gate structure, transitioning from the outer walkway into the city proper

entered.detail: massive stone gate structure with thick pillars and decorative carvings forming the city entrance
multi-tiered ancient buildings built into the cliff face with balconies and stone facades
wide stone stairs leading up to higher levels of the cliffside structures

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a monumental stone gate that serves as the city entrance. As the camera moves forward, impressive cliffside palace buildings reveal themselves on the left, built into the rock face. The lighting shifts as the character passes under the gate's shadow, transitioning from open sunlight to the sheltered entranceway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient town square with market stalls and scattered columns

events.description: character turns head and camera pans right to survey the surrounding architecture and plaza details

agents.ego_description: walking through the open town square while observing the ancient architecture and market stalls

notable_agents.action: townsperson standing near a building entrance observing the surroundings

entered.detail: weathered stone buildings with wooden balconies and detailed carvings lining the plaza
abandoned wooden cart with wheels parked near the building wall
tall decorative stone pillars scattered throughout the open square

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a wide sunlit town square paved with cobblestones. Ancient stone houses with wooden balconies line both sides of the plaza, while scattered stone columns rise from the ground. The character walks forward through the sparse crowd, briefly turning to observe the architecture, passing by a wooden market cart on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront terrace with ancient columns overlooking the sea

events.description: emerging from the town square onto the sunlit waterfront promenade with open water views

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront terrace while looking out toward the sea and ancient ruins

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the stone columns overlooking the water

entered.detail: row of tall ornate stone pillars lining the edge of the waterfront terrace
calm blue water visible beyond the terrace railing with distant landmasses
low stone wall and railing marking the edge of the waterfront promenade
bright sunlit rocky cliffs rising from the water on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sunlit waterfront terrace with the sea visible to the right. Tall stone columns line the promenade, backlit by the bright sun reflecting off the water. The camera turns slightly to take in the view of distant ruins and cliffs across the water while continuing to walk along the paved terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open desert approach into the heart of a sunlit ancient cliffside city. It begins on an elevated dirt walkway beside a high stone wall, moving forward toward a distant triumphal arch against a backdrop of mountains. As the character passes through the monumental stone gate, the lighting shifts from bright sunlight into a brief shadow before revealing impressive palace buildings carved directly into the rock face. The scene then opens into a wide cobblestone town square lined with stone houses and wooden balconies, where the camera glides past a market cart and scattered columns. Finally, the path leads onto a sunlit waterfront terrace, where the view expands to reveal a shimmering sea and distant ruins framed by a row of towering, backlit columns.
